title: MCPower: power analysis by simulation
description: MCPower is a Monte Carlo power-analysis tool: power and sample-size search by simulation for any design from t-tests to mixed models, across OLS, GLM, mixed-effects, and ANOVA. A single native Rust engine powers Python, R, desktop, and in-browser interfaces.

creators.name: Lenartowicz, Paweł
creators.affiliation: Society for Open Science (Stowarzyszenie na Rzecz Otwartej Nauki), Poland; Centre for Brain Research, Jagiellonian University, Kraków, Poland
